meta.title: Public Ledger Technology: Code Signing and Device Birth Certificates
meta.description:
Clay Carter of GE shows how they are using Certificate Transparency (CT) and Binary Transparency (BT) to prove software integrity. Code signing alone is not enough due to risk of CA compromise.

This technical session on S4's Stage 2 walks you through how the process works.
